programme.desc: Julieta no quiere ceder ante las peticiones de volver con su esposo y pide el divorcio con el cincuenta por ciento de los bienes correspondientes a su contrato matrimonial. Juan no se da por vencido e insiste en reconquistarla, pero tiene un rival.

programme.title: Los herederos del monte
programme.desc: Juan sufre el desprecio de Julieta en medio de su divorcio y la traición por un nuevo amor. Las verdades de la familia Millán se revelan con el amante de Rosa. Miguel busca consuelo en Sofía, pero resulta víctima de más mentiras.

programme.title: Los herederos del monte
programme.desc: Juan descubre el juego de Julieta con su hermano. Paula aprovecha el momento para presionar al hombre que ama, sin imaginar que José está allí para enfrentarla. Las amantes de Emilio siguen sufriendo por sus pecados en el pasado.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: Los Suárez se dan cuenta de que son vigilados. Es cuestión de horas para que los lobos entren a la casa. Lucho regresa justo a tiempo para ayudar a huir a Gabriela y a Constanza. Gabriela abraza a Lucho y él se alegra de no haberla defraudado.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: Constanza cobra la herencia y luego finge su muerte. Ricardo está devastado y Aníbal trata de cobrar la fortuna de su exesposa. Gabriela quiere pagarle a Lucho para que se vaya y él, a cambio, le declara su amor. Gabriela declara su odio a sus enemigos.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: La declaración de Lucho conmueve a Gabriela, pero ella le advierte que no puede amar a nadie. Gabriela comienza su transformación en la nueva patrona: Verónica Dantés. Gastón llega como el abanderado de la nueva señora y le ofrece ayuda a Aníbal.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: La Patrona no quiere que Lucho hable más del hombre que una vez amó. Alejandro recibe una invitación para conocer a Verónica Dantés, una poderosa mujer que despierta la curiosidad de todos. Francisca cree que es mejor seguir viviendo en su casa.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Óscar propone una manera de desquitarse de los Elizondo sin mancharse las manos de sangre. Gabriela regresa sin avisar y entrevista a los trabajadores, Juan no puede ocultar su rabia y dolor.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Juan acepta seducir a las Elizondo, sus hermanos se preocupan por su actitud al conocer a Norma. Gabriela presiona a su hija para que comience a corresponderle a Fernando como esposa.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Jimena cita a Franco en un parque y se besan, él quiere ir más allá. Norma y Fernando celebran su primer aniversario de matrimonio en el bar, él se deslumbra con la presentación de Rosario.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: La invitación a un rodeo en la hacienda es la ocasión perfecta para que Juan consiga la atención de Norma. Rosario termina con Franco para protegerlo y le prohíbe su entrada al bar.

programme.title: Los herederos del monte
programme.desc: Julieta amenaza a Paula y le declara una guerra frontal. Ella hace hasta lo imposible para vengar el dolor de un hijo perdido. Gustavo llega a la hacienda para iniciar el trámite de divorcio, pero José le insiste que debe reconciliar a la pareja.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester applies for a job as an insurance salesman with the same company which is threatening to cancel the Addamses' policy (because Fester keeps blowing things up). Fester convinces the company interviewer that he is qualified for the job.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch becomes inconsolable when Gomez donates the family antique harpsichord to a collector. Gomez and Morticia offer Lurch a balalaika and a set of drums. When this proves unsatisfactory, Gomez and Fester decide to build a new harpsichord.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Morticia hears the stock market has crashed, she assumes that Gomez has been financially wiped out and rallies the family to help make money. Morticia gives lessons, Lurch and Fester run an escort service, and the kids run a poison drink stand.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: While enjoying a moonlight picnic and snail hunt, the Addams Family is mistaken for Martians by uniformed investigators from Mysterious Space Objects Headquarters. In turn, Gomez (John Astin) and the clan regard their inquisitors with suspicion.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: An organ grinder's fugitive monkey leads Fester to believe that he has turned Pugsley into a monkey. Morticia and Gomez treat the monkey as though he were their son, welcoming him to the dinner table and giving him Pugsley's chores.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia's favorite charity is having an auction--so Morticia persuades her family to part with things to sell. Donations include Wednesday's headless doll, the old flogging table, a stuffed vulture and Uncle Fester's dynamite.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: The Addams Family ignores notices that their house is to be condemned to make way for a freeway. When sudden explosions cannot be traced to any member of the family but, instead, to city workmen, Gomez is forced to consider moving the house.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester's pen pal, Madelyn, is coming to visit. Fester panics, as he has described himself as handsome, heroic and romantic. Gomez and Morticia agree that all Fester needs is a toupee and they help him make several styles.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez are worried about Cousin Itt because he spends his days sleeping and dreaming in his tiny room. They decide that Itt would make an excellent marriage counselor, and pretend to be a couple with a failing marriage.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: A recording company's platter of Lurch's gravelly voice brings a screaming mob of teenage fans to the Addams house. To calm the crowd, Lurch seats himself at the harpsichord and rewards his fans with a song to end all songs.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Taken in by a psychologist's pronouncement that the only happily married couples are those who fight members of the Addams household devise schemes to start a battle between Gomez (John Astin) and Morticia (Carolyn Jones).

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Gomez decides to bolster Cousin Itt's failing ego by making him the star of a production aimed as a birthday surprise for Wednesday. He hires the great director, Eric von Bissell, who gives Itt elocution lessons, causing a Hollywood star complex.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: While Morticia and Gomez are celebrating their 13th wedding anniversary, she tells Wednesday and Pugsley a bedtime story of how she and Gomez first met. In this episode, Carolyn Jones plays Morticia, Morticia as a 22-year-old, and sister Ophelia.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Wednesday and Pugsley refuse to go to bed until they hear the rest of the courtship story. Morticia resumes the tale via flashback, including the ceremony beginning with Ophelia Frump, Morticia's balmy sister, as the bride.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Romance seems close for Thing, the Addams right-hand-in-a-box, when Gomez's aunt arrives for a visit accompanied by Lady Fingers, her handmaiden. Thing enjoys the visit most because it gives him a chance to hold hands with one of his own kind.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez visit Mayor Henson to complain that their property tax is ridiculously low. After the Mayor proves his incompetence by offering a refund, Gomez is persuaded to become a candidate for the office.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: During a welcome home party for Cousin Itt, Morticia notices that the diminutive guest of honor seems to be losing his hair. Uncle Fester experiments with his chemistry set to produce a concoction that grows hair and tries the remedy on Itt.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Wednesday and Pugsley return in tears from trick-or-treating because a neighbor has told them there is no such thing as a witch. Morticia and Gomez plan to prove to the children that they do exist--by summoning a witch to a séance.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Determined to correct the dreadful literature that Wednesday and Pugsley are exposed to, Morticia sets out to create a new literary world. Gomez fears that his wife's first manuscript is so good, that once the publisher reads it he will lose her.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: In need of artistic fulfillment, Morticia takes up sculpting. An art critic views her first endeavor--a three-eyed Gomez statue--and clubs it with his cane. Gomez, who won't have Morticia's heart broken gets a seedy art dealer to buy it.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Pugsley copies one of his dad's old love letters and sends it to his teacher. Miss Dunbar comes to visit the Addams home and confesses to Gomez that no man has ever fallen so in love with her, leading Morticia to pretend to be the jealous wife.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: After Wednesday befriends a new boy her age, Robespierre Courtney, Morticia invites his parents, Mr. and Mrs. Henry Courtney to visit the Addams house for tea. Unbeknownst to them, the Courtney's are hoping to meet a number of the social set.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: There is a neighborhood burglar on the loose, and Morticia has reason to believe it could be Gomez. Morticia decides to probe his subconscious mind for a key to his criminality after she and Uncle Fester discover loot hidden in the storeroom.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia's pet plant Cleopatra gobbles up her favorite photo of Gomez from the family album. When the original photographer is found and asked to make a duplicate picture, it is discovered that he is now with the Department of Motor Vehicles.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Gomez plays host to Don Xavier Molines, a family friend during his childhood in Spain, and his daughter Consuella. Morticia's hospitality is put to the test when Consuella reveals that she has been promised in marriage to Gomez since childhood.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Wednesday's and Pugsley's faith in Santa Claus is shaken, Uncle Fester is chosen to back up Santa in case the real St. Nick is too busy to come. However, Fester-Santa gets stuck in the chimney, so each of the other adults fills in for him.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Fester is so smitten upon receipt of a photo of his love, a bearded carnival lady, that he borrows stamp money to mail her a proposal. Morticia dons a beard and poses as the mother to convince Fester that he will have to work to support a wife.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Enemies are made when one team steals another team's taxi in Ho Chi Minh, Vietnam.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Teams take a leap of faith when choosing which detour challenge to take on. And, a split-second decision may make or break one team's life.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Teams must drum up enough strength for an intense head-to-head battle before checking into the mat.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The Teams travel to Switzerland where they free-fall over 400 feet into the Gletscherschlucht Glacier Gorge.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: While in Switzerland, teams are surprised with the first ever public U-turn vote, where racers have to vote in front of each other.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Teams take a bumpy ride in Split, Croatia and try not to get tongue-twisted reciting poetry while in motion.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The final five teams try not to crack while transporting eggs across town by bicycle in the Netherlands.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: With the $1 million on the line, the final four teams race through London. The team to cross the finish line first will be crowned the winners!

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The Amazing Race" celebrates travelling one million miles around the world when the 32nd race kicks off from Los Angeles.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Teams race through Bogotá, Colombia, where they encounter the "Yield," which gives them the power to stop another team's race for a designated amount of time.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Teams are in Manaus, Brazil, where they have big decisions to make when they encounter the first U-turn of the race.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Teams race through Asunción, Paraguay, where they must either stack a pyramid of watermelons or perform a traditional Paraguayan bottle dance.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Teams in Paris, France, must whip up some tasty treats and make enough Chantilly cream for four pies, as well as compete in a series of carnival games.

programme.desc: On behalf of the victim's daughter, the law firm sues a convicted murderer who is profiting from a song he wrote describing his crime. Meanwhile, Eli anonymously uses the firm to help Natalie Flores and her family with their legal troubles.

programme.title: The Good Wife
programme.desc: To Lockhart/Gardner's disbelief, Louis Canning returns to face off against Alicia once again when the firm represents families of workers who committed suicide due to miserable working conditions. Meanwhile, Cary finds out shocking information about Kalin

programme.title: The Good Wife
programme.desc: Lockhart/Gardner represents a small drilling contractor against a major oil conglomerate in a dispute that is going well until a South American dictator complicates the situation. Meanwhile, the election results are in.

programme.title: The Good Wife
programme.desc: Lockhart/Gardner defends a patient in a liver transplant case against rival attorney Patti Nyholm; however, the case takes a turn when Patti is fired from her law firm and asks Lockhart/Gardner to represent her. Alicia deals with emotional fall.

programme.title: The Good Wife
programme.desc: Lockhart/Gardner defends Stephanie Engler, the owner of an adultery website after one of her users is murdered; however, the civil case turns criminal when the murder is pinned on Stephanie. Alicia goes ballistic on Kalinda about her one-night stand

programme.title: The Good Wife
programme.desc: Despite their tense relationship, Alicia and Kalinda rush to prove their client's innocence in a murder trial, while the timing might finally be right for Alicia and Will to pursue their relationship.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Animal Adventures
programme.desc: The people of Maui love the endangered humpback. Join Jack, a group of seaworthy school children and the Pacific Whale Foundation for a first-rate expedition to observe these 40-ton gentle giants.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Come along with Jungle Jack as he meets up with researchers on the front-lines of animal conservation as they work to protect Elephants, Lions, Rattlesnakes, Bats and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Wildlife Crime-Fighters
programme.desc: Jungle Jack is heading to the frontlines witnessing conservation and anti-poaching efforts in action around the world all to help save threatened and endangered species. Rhinos, elephants, primates and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Join Jungle Jack as he meets record-breakers in the animal kingdom like the fastest feline, the animal with the strongest jaws, the world's loudest species, and lots of other chart-topping creatures.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Jack's Scariest Countdown
programme.desc: Join Jungle Jack for a heart-pounding adventure with lions, crocs, king cobras, sea snakes, bats and Tasmanian devils!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Join Jungle Jack as he meets some animals that stockpile food and supplies. Check out the fascinating behaviors of Leaf-cutter Ants, Bears, Leopards, Honey Bees, Camels and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Join Jack for a countdown dedicated to the largest members of the great ape family… gorillas!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack and Sue meet up with renowned conservationists Chryssee and Esmond Bradley Martin in Kenya and see hyenas, warthogs, and even a cheetah, before searching for white rhinos in Nairobi National Park.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Helping Hands
programme.desc: Jungle Jack is counting down animals that count on us! Baboons crossing the road in South Africa, dogs getting vaccinated in Botswana, orphans getting nursed back to health in Panama…it’s six stories about lending a helping hand.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Whether they cross huge distances in a single leap like kangaroos, or gracefully soar above the waves like dolphins, or escape from predators like frogs, all of today’s countdown creatures are built to bounce, bound and jump around.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack goes behind the scenes at the Columbus Zoo, visiting its oldest and newest residents. Then Jack heads to the OSU equine center and goes on rounds with the vet staff before heading to a metro park that is re-introducing a herd of American bison.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: On this adventure, Jack takes you on whirlwind trip, from his home at the Columbus Zoo, to some of his favorite destinations in Africa, Australia and Florida.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: The Atacama Desert in northern Chile is known as the highest and driest desert in the world. Jack wants to explore it all-from colorful flamingos to rare cats and even a newly discovered species.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Join Jungle Jack for six of his all-time scariest safaris. Come along as he comes face-to-face with Alligators, Lions, Elephants, Cheetah, Tigers and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Join Jungle Jack for an adventure to Santa Cruz Island where he visits the mating grounds of giant Galapagos Tortoises. Then he dives into the Pacific Ocean for an encounter with Galapagos Penguins and Sea Turtles.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Scavenger Hunt
programme.desc: What do jackals, sharks and leopards have in common? They’re scavengers, some of the most resourceful creatures! They survive on the remains that hunters leave behind, whether it’s deep in the woods, at the bottom of the sea, or even up a tree!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack and Suzi explore Catalina Island, off the coast of California, and track down a herd of wild Bison that have been living there since 1924. They also uncover bats roosting in an old barn and meet the island's local veterinarian.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: From the largest African elephant Jack has ever seen, to the littlest elephants on the planet…come along for the journey of a lifetime with the biggest land mammals on the planet!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack is heading to Florida to meet some unexpected residents in the small town of Wauchula. Nestled among the orange groves, the Center for Great Apes is providing a loving home to dozens of orangutans and chimpanzees in need.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Join Jungle Jack as he runs, jumps and leaps his way across the world with man's best friend. From dogs that are helping save wild cheetah in Africa, to dogs that have been given a second chance at life right here in the ole' U.S.A.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Join Jack as he journeys to Lake Nakuru National Park where wildlife is prospering in Central Kenya. The thriving ecosystem is home to more than a million flamingos, endangered white and black rhinos, and the rare Rothschild giraffe.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Come along with Jungle Jack as he embarks on a safari through Florida's Everglades, where he comes face-to-face with alligators and rattlesnakes. And, a rare look at the Native American traditions of the Seminole Tribe.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Come along with Jack on an adventure to bear country in Montana! Jack and some local bear experts come face-to-face with a grizzly that raided a family's farmhouse. Then Jack discovers amazing animal behaviors caught on tape.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Seeing Red
programme.desc: Jungle Jack Hanna is seeing red in this exclusive Wild Countdown! Discover why this color is so important to the survival of these animals in their natural habitats and find out who comes out on top!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Some animals have been using social networks for eons, like herds of elephants, colonies of ants and bees, hyena clans and even chimpanzees. Today, Jungle Jack will see what it takes to get “likes” from these special species.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Come along on an epic adventure to meet the big cats of Tanzania. These top predators include Lions, Cheetahs, and Leopards.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Join Jack and his family for an unforgettable adventure through Alberta, Canada! Jack kicks off his journey in Waterton – home to the world's first international peace park – before heading into the Canadian Rockies in search of moose.

programme.title: The Love Boat

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: A provincial woman finds herself hopelessly in love with a paid escort, while Gopher sees the ghost of a man and wife still occupying a room aboard the ship.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: A beautiful, fun-loving woman with a secret (Joan Fontaine) reunites with a former love (Richard Basehart) aboard the ship. Plus, an inept German detective almost turns the Pacific Princess upside down when his employer's jewels are stolen.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: As widow tries to set up her spinster sister with an English lord, Isaac's overtures to a beautiful girl fall apart when his new tooth filling starts receiving strange transmissions.n may lead to divorce.

programme.title: The Love Boat

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: An emotionally cold woman finds herself falling for a Romeo with hot ideas. Meanwhile, a widow's romance with an attractive dentist is hindered by her nosy, card-playing companions (Rose Marie, Jan Clayton, and Lucille Benson).

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: An emotionally cold woman finds herself falling for a Romeo with hot ideas. Meanwhile, a widow's romance with an attractive dentist is hindered by her nosy, card-playing companions (Rose Marie, Jan Clayton, and Lucille Benson).

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: Capt. Stubing develops an unusual relationship with a lovely woman who is tasked with painting his portrait.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: Gopher is shocked when he finds his old college roommate is different than he remembers. At the same time, an embittered and retired pianist agrees to perform again in order to pay for a handicapped woman's surgery.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: A man falls in love with a beautiful woman who believes the couple was married in a past life 100 years earlier. The crew's amusement at Julie's new hairstyle creates pandemonium.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: A female doctor's temperature rises when she meets Isaac, who tries to avoid his physical exam so he can hide a congenital condition. Meanwhile, a young woman and her mother learn devastating truths about each other when they meet the daughter's fiance.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: While the captain's daughter falls for Gopher, a book publisher flips a page in the book of love when trying to sign a burly author who happens to be accompanied by his attractive niece. Plus, an unusual couple looks for treasure.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Photography has long been a vital tool in homicide investigations. A single image captures enough information to identify a suspect, and to preserve a vital clue long after a witness' memory fades.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Psychological Profiling: Journey into the dark recesses and calculated madness present only in our worst nightmares…and in the minds of serial killers.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: New Forensic Techniques used to Solve Old Cases: Advancement in science and technology are encouraging people to revisit the past in hopes of answering questions that have remained unanswered, and solving crimes that seemed unsolvable.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: When killers hide or destroy the remains of their victims, it becomes the mission of forensic scientists to reconstruct the scenes and prove murder for an absent witness.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Tool marking: A tool used to commit a crime can often be the same tool used to solve it. The pattern a machine leaves on an item, the unusual way a tool crimps a wire, and even something as innocuous as the shape of a wood chip can lead to a killer.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Handwriting Analysis: We've all heard that our handwriting tells more about our personalities than we think. Are we risk-takers, have low-esteem, fun loving, or are we capable of murder?

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: A millionaire is found dead, murdered for a stash of buried silver. A young woman dates violent men, only to be killed by her best friend.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Some killers choose to hide their victims – And investigators must then rely on forensic examiners to uncover proof of murder – These are just two extraordinary crimes that have made their way into the medical examiner's casebook.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: When a murder is committed and deceit clouds the evidence, investigators turn to science and technology to uncover the truth and expose a murderous lie and capture the killer.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Forensic Sculpting: Forensic sculptors retrieve people from oblivion. Using clay and an intricate knowledge of anatomy, forensic arts place a face on an unidentified skull, recreating the victim's likeness, which often leads to his name.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: A dog can be a dead man's best friend. Dogs have been trained to sniff out corpses, drugs, explosives, and missing persons. They're often the first to find the essential clue that sets an investigation in motion.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Poison is the subtlest form of death, and investigators must see through unusual circumstances to bring these murders to light.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Fingerprinting: The identification Division of the FBI relies on fingerprints as one of the most effective ways to identify criminals.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: At a crime scene, anything left behind or seemingly out of place is considered a clue. But a fire can extinguish everything in its path –challenging forensic investigators at every turn and making each arson a trial by fire.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: No one is more surprised than Micah when newcomer Leota Carraway claims he's her long-lost husband and the father of her child.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas is torn by conflicting emotions when he meets the town's new preacher, a former outlaw whom the Rifleman vowed to kill.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: The town of North Fork becomes a haven for outlaws when suave Ben Judson smooth-talks his way into the marshal's job.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A handsome gambler moves into town and begins wooing Milly Scott, claiming to have known her deceased brother.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas develops temporary amnesia from a head injury while visiting a strange town and mistakenly assumes the identity of a wanted criminal.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A former neighbor of the McCains' is released from jail after serving his sentence for robbery. Lucas lets the man work for him but the new hand holds a secret.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When Lucas, Mark, and Micah get lost in Old Mexico, they are held hostage by a group of bandits who intend to kill the men and take Mark as a slave.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: While trapped in the ghost town saloon, Lucas tries to come up with a plan to escape with his son and Micah after Mark refuses to leave without him.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lou Mallory arrives in North Fork and starts buying up land and businesses. Lou and Lucas start disliking each other after she reveals plans to build a railroad on "worthless" land.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When a woman arrives in North Fork with symptoms of smallpox, Lucas, Lou Mallory, Doctor Burrage, and hotel occupants are quarantined in the hotel with an outlaw.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Gunslinger Johnny Drako rides into town and tells the bartender that he is looking for Lucas McCain. After Johnny leaves the saloon, Sweeney hurries to tell Lucas.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A man arrives in North Fork, intending to marry Lou Mallory. The hotel owner looks for a way out from marrying the man to whom her dying father promised her.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: An assassination plot unfolds as four gunmen disguised as cavalrymen enter North Fork. Their target: Sen. Jim Borden. Their weapon: a Gatling gun.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Sharpshooter Marty Blair tries to persuade Lucas to buy Mark a rifle. After Lucas shoots a man during a robbery at the hotel, Mark and Lucas disagree with his character.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Fast-draw artist Wade Randall is in town, bragging of his gun battles with notorious bad men until one of them shows up to challenge his story.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When Lucas refuses to sell his land, Mr. Prescott will stop at nothing to change his mind. He hires men to try to persuade Lucas, but he refuses.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Mark's careless actions cause the death of a friend. Unable to accept the truth, he blames the rifle and runs away from home. Soon, he is faced with a tough decision.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Nils Swenson takes the marshal's place for a few days while Micah is away. To maintain peace, Nils insists that anyone coming into town must turn in their weapons.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas's self-confidence begins to slip away when he misses an easy shot that could have cost Mark his life.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A murder occurs at a railroad camp and a young Indian friend of Lucas is accused of the killing. When Lucas tries to help the boy, he finds himself on trial.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas and Mark come upon Winslow Quince, a peddler whose wagon has broken down. They help him bring his wagon to North Fork for repair.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Gridley Mau, the son of a man Lucas killed during an attempted robbery, comes to North Fork looking for revenge.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: The first railroad train is coming to the new North Fork station. Onboard is a Japanese nobleman and his servant, visiting the West to learn about the United States.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: At Halloween, rustlers take advantage of the seasonal disguises to raid a cattle ranch. Lucas' faith in his son's honesty is shaken when he hears rumors of Mark being mixed up with the thieves.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Mark and Lucas run into Micah on the trail and help when the prisoner he is transporting injures his arm. Lucas' life is endangered when a snake crawls into his bed.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: While Mark goes hunting for Old Spike, Lucas goes hunting for his mortal enemy. Lucas is thrown into jail to stop him from murdering his former friend.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas is baffled when the marshal of a neighboring town refuses to hold a gambler who just attempted murder.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: After facing all of the recent trials, a slight detour may offer the solution that the group has been seeking.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: The group feels beaten after living life on the road, but must continue to trudge along in spite of the changes they have incurred.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: After withstanding a spectacular storm, Rick and the others meet what appears to be a friendly person, but find themselves mistrustful.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: The group has a difficult time molding to a new lifestyle, forcing them to consider whether they can be the people they once were.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: As Rick and the others continue to acclimate to their new surroundings, they consider a return to normalcy.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: While trying to secure a new home, Rick and his group face challenges, and question the utopia they find themselves in.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: When life within the walls begins to mimic life outside, the group realizes that sheltered life may not be possible.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Daryl finds trouble while on a run; Rick and the group feel like outsiders in Alexandria, where trouble approaches the gates.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Rick and the others have a difficult time assimilating into Alexandria; a new threat arises that could bring the group closer together.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: When it appears that things are starting to normalize in the settlement, a new problem arises for the Alexandrians.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: A small group, including Rick, runs into hurdles while trying to return to Alexandria, and some may not make it back.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Morgan recalls his travels from King County to Alexandria, where he encountered a solo survivor who taught him a new code to live by.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: The sheltered citizens inside the walls of Alexandria must face a grim reality that might be too much for them to handle; Deanna doubts her leadership.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Daryl, Abraham and Sasha encounter many obstacles and a new threat while trying to return to Alexandria.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Alexandria is finally able to begin pulling itself back together; peace is embraced between the two groups.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: After a few moments of peace, trouble finds its way to Alexandria again with a threat that may be too big to defeat.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Un rostro familiar regresa cuando cada uno de los miembros del grupo lucha por encontrar su propia humanidad en un mundo de peligro constante.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Un nuevo y horripilante capítulo se desarrolla en un campamento fuera de la prisión. ¿Podrán lograr la paz con la adición de nuevos integrantes?

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Justo cuando la situación comenzaba a calmarse en la prisión, Rick y su grupo se enfrentan a peligro y destrucción inminentes. Esta vez podrían no ganar.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Mientras Rick se ocupa de viejas heridas, los miembros de la prisión tienen que adaptarse al nuevo entorno y preguntarse a sí mismos si la supervivencia por sí sola es suficiente.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: El grupo encuentra muchos obstáculos tratando de encontrar estabilidad y seguridad, pero a veces lo único que los guía es la esperanza.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Justo cuando Rick piensa que va a poder relajarse, se enfrenta a múltiples peligros inmediatos. Otros integrantes del grupo lidian con su pasado.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Enfrentados a la supervivencia diaria fuera del refugio, un simple pedido de uno de los integrantes del grupo conduce a una misión extraña pero instructiva.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Mientras un grupo encuentra lo que podría ser un refugio ideal, otro grupo se da cuenta de que la mejor protección es la que brindan las personas que los acompañan.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Después de encontrar un lugar idílico para establecer un nuevo refugio, el grupo comienza a cuestionarse si es posible que las cosas vuelvan a ser como eran antes.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Aunque algunos sobrevivientes crean que deben ser brutales para mantenerse con vida, vemos que la fe a veces puede ser la herramienta de supervivencia más poderosa.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Mientras múltiples caminos se entrechocan, Rick se enfrenta cara a cara con la brutalidad más absoluta. ¿Él y su grupo tendrán lo que hace falta para sobrevivir?

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: En el comienzo de la quinta temporada, conoceremos las verdaderas intenciones de la gente de Terminus; mientras, Rick y el grupo se encuentran rodeados, superados en armas y en número.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Con pocas provisiones, y sin poder confiar en la gente a su alrededor, Rick lidera una misión donde el riesgo podría ser mucho mayor que la recompensa.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Enfrentados a un grupo de personas despreciables, Rick y sus compañeros deberán idear un plan para obtener una ventaja decisiva.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Dr. Loveless, a dwarf, watches his giant assistant, Voltaire, subdue a dock guardas he (Loveless) pre-pares to kill disembarking Prof. Neilsen, arriving to present his formula for a new explosive to the U.S.government.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Four men, aided by a guard named Foxx, gain entrance to the U.S. Mint in Carson City and connect a hose to a street gaslight in order to asphyxiate three workers.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: A man from the Attorney General's office in Washington is killed while attempting to take the wanted John Avery into custody, so secret agent James T.West is assigned to the task.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Traffic on the lower Mississippi River has come to a virtual standstill because of the marauding tactics of a blind pirate leader and his cutthroat gang.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: James T. West is blamed for an impending international crisis when a quantity of priceless 'franconium,' a substance of fantastic power and owned by France, is stolen from under his nose at the French Consulate.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Secret agents James T. West and Artemus Gordon determine to track down a missing Albanian princess when the regal young lady they have been guarding turns out to be an impostor.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Cheyenne Indians are believed responsible for the daily death of five laborers whoare working to construct a railroad line. It is claimed that the Indians will stop the attacks if they are paid $500,000 in gold spikes.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Secret agent James T. West fights off an unprovoked knife-wielding assailant and then meets a beautiful blonde named Marie.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: U.S. agent James T. West enlists in a secret army of fanatics whose demented leader is plotting to overthrow United States Army units stationed in the Southwest.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Secret agents James T. West and Artemus Gordon go after Dr. Cadwallader, demented geologist who is systematically devastating the state of Wyoming with man-made earthquakes.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Gov. Bradford and his secretary, Miss Piecemeal, watch as the governor's statue is unveiled during a private showing at the Bolt Museum. Suddenly, the statue blinks, and Bradford, immobilized by an injection, is taken prisoner.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: U.S. secret agent James T. West is lured into a hospital where he is gassed and carried out in a coffin by the weird, zombie-like aides of one Dr. Arcularis.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Secret agent James T. West poses as a notorious desperado, Frank Slade, inaplan to arrest a Mexican bandit, Colonel Vasquez, who has been robbing banks in American border towns and then fleeing to the sanctuary of Mexico.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Iron Man Torres strangles a shop owner named Gilbert as secret agent James T. West passes by.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Restored white oak entry doors are reinstalled, connections to the appliances and sink are finished. Norm sees the new temporary wall in the master bedroom. Kevin gets a lesson in furniture shopping.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: After final installations and a look at the whole transformation, the crew gathers on the front stoop to celebrate the completion of the project and to congratulate Michael Streaman on a job well done.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: The 30th anniversary season of This Old House opens with an addition to a Dutch Colonial Revival. The architect presents his plan, while Tom Silva and Norm Abram arrive to begin the demolition.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Norm Abram and Tom Silva remove the vinyl siding from the house’s exterior. Kevin O’Connor travels to Raleigh, North Carolina. Roger Cook breaks up the old porch slab.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: The homeowners decide to stay in the house during construction. Richard Trethewey gets to work in the basement. Tom extends the old windowsills. Kevin O’Connor gets bad news from the electrician.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Kevin O'Connor and Tom Silva reinforce and level the kitchen ceiling. Kevin visits Long Island, New York, to learn about the Dutch Colonial Revival style. Norm Abram frames the first-floor platform.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Tom Silva builds the gable-end wall. The master electrician sets up temporary power. Richard Trethewey shows Kevin the new lines to the old radiators. Tom walks Kevin through the roof framing.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Tom Silva and Kevin O'Connor reframe the kitchen walls. Tom installs a large new window in the library. Homeowner Gillian Pierce envisions her new kitchen. Kevin visits a former TOH architect.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Roger Cook helps prune hemlock trees. The master electrician installs a bath fan. Kevin O'Connor revisits a green building project. Tom Silva shows Kevin how he's roofing the new addition.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Tom Silva replicates exterior trim using cellular PVC. Norm Abram installs an exterior door. Architect Paul Rovinelli takes Kevin O'Connor on a tour. Tom gets help in removing bookshelves and a wall.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Tom Silva fabricates a decorative bracket. Richard Trethewey heats the new kitchen space. Interior designer Lisey Good demonstrates smart storage solutions. Norm Abram patches the exterior siding.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Tom Silva builds a stairway to the basement. Richard Trethewey shows how to select a faucet. Tom works on a vaulted ceiling. An insulation contractor installs spray foam insulation.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Tom Silva and Norm Abram install copper gutters. The plastering contractor puts up a coat of plaster. Kevin O’Connor learns about a new paint product. Tom removes the old garage.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Kevin O'Connor helps Tom Silva build a new deck. Roger Cook lays concrete pavers for the patio. A tile specialist shows Kevin options for the kitchen. Norm Abram learns about the new oak flooring.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Roger Cook puts down new asphalt. Norm Abram helps Tom Silva install cabinets. Kevin learns about cabinet lighting. The painting contractor strips wallpaper. Tom and Norm trim out kitchen windows.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Roger Cook acquires some plants. The painting contractor shows how to paint a ceiling. Kevin O’Connor meets with a countertop fabricator. Kevin helps Tom Silva construct bookshelves for the living room.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Kevin O'Connor inspects the kitchen. Roger Cook goes shopping. The countertop fabricator installs a butcher block. Norm Abram and Tom Silva work with oak. The tile contractor installs the backsplash.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: In the final show from Newton Centre, all hands are on deck. Lead by Tom Silva, the modest project (with a modest budget) tightened up the old house while adding on living space for the family.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: For the season’s second project, the crew partners with the City of Boston and non-profit Nuestra Comunidad to take a foreclosed house and turn it into affordable housing in Roxbury, Massachusetts.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Norm Abram talks with general contractor David Lopes. Kevin O'Connor meets with a non-profit developer and our project house’s buyer. Norm examines the house’s structure. A crew raises the walls.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Norm Abram meets with the general contractor and looks at slate-like shingles. Kevin O'Connor examines the new siding. The paint color consultant explains the color scheme.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Kevin O'Connor checks the house’s progress. Richard Trethewey sees the HVAC system. Kevin visits Florida’s Fort Myers area. The homeowner explains her interior design. Norm Abram installs decking.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Roger Cook works with students from YouthBuild Boston. The fence contractor installs a PVC fence. Norm Abram installs casings and paneling. A preservation plasterer casts elements for the house.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: A carpenter installs crown molding. The homeowner considers paint colors. Norm Abram examines the new front doors. Kevin finds a marble fireplace. The lead carpenter installs the front doors.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Norm Abram travels to Dover, N.H. A stone specialist installs a marble fireplace. A flooring contractor installs a birch floor. The interior designer explains her kitchen designs.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Roger Cook works on the front yard. Norm Abram looks at the second unit. The homeowner learns to maintain her new countertops. Richard Trethewey installs a new water heater.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: With one week left, Kevin O’Connor learns to install tiles for the kitchen backsplash. Kevin visits our previous non-profit development. Tom Silva helps install the new stairs.

programme.desc: Cris builds a murphy bed and a bathroom vanity for her studio.

programme.title: Cristiana Felgueiras: This Old House Makers Channel
programme.desc: Cris builds an entry closet with sliding mirror doors and a tongue drum from padauk wood.

programme.desc: Brad makes a shoe rack with a shou sugi ban finish and installs vinyl flooring.

programme.desc: Brad designs outdoor chairs, but mistakes were made, and he must dismantle and rebuild.

programme.title: Brad Rodriguez: This Old House Makers Channel
programme.desc: Brad shares his favorite tools under $20 and creates simple ways to organize drawers.

programme.desc: Brad builds sound panels and heavy-duty storage cabinets for his workshop.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack must come up with a "wife" to persuade his boss's man-hungry daughter that he's not available.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Janet fumes when she inadvertently fixes up Terri with a guy she wanted to date herself.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack tries to subdue a drunk at the Regal Beagle, but it's Terri who takes care of the masher with her karate skills.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack concocts a plan to regain the favor of an attractive Southern Belle he insulted on a date. Guest Star(s): Gwen Humble

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Larry devises an acid test to see if Furley's latest find is actually a gold-digger.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack panics when he suspects Terri's friend wants to give up her life as a nun and marry him.

programme.desc: On July 26th, 2008, Antonio Margarito fought Miguel Cotto for the WBA World Welterweight Title at the MGM Grand in Las Vegas, in a very close and entertaining fight.

programme.title: Marvin Hagler vs Thomas Hearns
programme.desc: On April 15th, 1985, Marvin Hagler fought Thomas Hearns for the undisputed Middleweight Title at Caesars Palace in Las Vegas. Hagler and Hearns absolutely went at it from the bell which ended with Hagler securing a thrilling knockout victory.

programme.title: Miguel Cotto vs Kelson Pinto
programme.desc: On September 11th, 2004 Miguel Cotto faced Kelson Pinto at the Coliseo Jose Miguel Agrelot in Hato Rey in battle for WBO World Super lightweight titles with the bout ending halfway through in the sixth round securing the win for Cotto.

programme.title: Mikaela Mayer vs Ewa Brodnicka

programme.title: Miguel Cotto vs Sergio Martinez

programme.title: Alex Saucedo vs Abner Lopez

programme.title: Mikaela Mayer vs Maiva Hamadouche
programme.desc: On November 5th, 2021 Mikaela Mayer faced Maiva Hamadouche for the IBF and WBO World Super Featherweight title the 10 round bout ended in a unanimous decision victory for Mayer.

programme.title: Roy Jones Jr vs James Toney
programme.desc: On November 18th, 1994, Roy Jones Jr fought James Toney for the IBF Super Middleweight Title at the MGM Grand in Las Vegas. Jones displayed his exceptional athleticism and speed, outclassing Toney to win a unanimous decision victory.

programme.title: Mike Alvarado vs Brandon Rios 2
programme.desc: On March 30th, 2013, Mike Alvarado fought Brandon Rios for the WBO Light Welterweight Title at the Mandalay Bay in Las Vegas. In the rematch, Alvarado avenged his loss by earning a unanimous decision victory in an absolute battle.

programme.title: Roy Jones Jr vs Percy Harris

programme.title: Mike Weaver vs John Tate

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Lana Star and The Fab Four aim to be back on top with the gold this week in Penelope Pink's Main Event Championship Match against WOW Champion Abilene Maverick.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The WOW Trios Tournament officially kicks off as Team Spirit and Team IQ Superior both look to pick up the first win and advance.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The next Tag Team Championship Match is on everybody's minds as The Tonga Twins set up a Fatal Four Way Main Event to determine their next challenger. The Trios Tournament continues as Stephy Slays and The Mighty Mights face a fractured Team Exile.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: There's no stopping Americana as she challenges Jessie Jones to a one-on-one contest in The Main Event, despite concerns from Santana Garrett. The Brat Pack is joined by an intriguing third member as they enter the first round of the Trios Tournament.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The Last Call demands a championship match against The Tonga Twins. Las Bandidas and Tormenta hope that Latin Power can stand tall in their first trios tournament match against The Mighty Mights and Keta Rush.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: It's finally time for Princess Aussie's singles match against WOW World Champion Abilene Maverick as the Australian tries to prove that she'll never give up chasing her dream.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Coach Campanelli addresses the fallout from last week's Trios Tournament Match, and Team Spirit's path forward as the tournament continues with Tormenta and Las Bandidas facing Team Exile in the next semi final match.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The Fab Four are incensed to find out that because of their constant attacks on The Mother Truckers, David McLane has granted Big Rig Betty and Holly Swag a Main Event tag team match against Penelope Pink and Vickie Lynn McCoy.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Jessie Jones and Amber O'Neal have a new look, but it's make or break for The All American Girls as they call their shot against them for the Main Event.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The VIP Abilene Maverick is firmly in The Beast's crosshairs as The Beast finally gets the rematch she's been waiting on for weeks, and a chance to reclaim the WOW World Championship that she never lost.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The Beast demands justice after taking a loss in the WOW World Championship Match in the last episode of WOW.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Following the astonishing events of the Trios Tournament Finals last week, Coach Campanelli's newly formed Top Tier Team with herself, Kandi Krush and Gloria Glitter make their intentions crystal clear to the WOW roster.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: To prove that the members of Team Spirit are more than just benchwarmers, Ariel Sky challenges Top Tier to face Team Spirit head on in the Main Event.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: After the truth about Abilene Maverick's injury is revealed, David McLane reminds her of her obligation to defend The WOW World Championship Title.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh brings in \\"Doc\\" Phillips hoping he can lure Clell Fanning out as he has an old score to settle with Clell.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh is arrested on a bogus horse-stealing charge.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: To net a thousand-dollar reward and save a friend, Josh saves Tolliver Bender from hanging so he can testify in a nearby trial.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: An attractive woman hires Josh for $1000 to clear her father on a false murder charge in a town that is not very welcoming to Josh.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh and Jason are hired to chase a killer who went to Mexico by his brother who is about to hang for a crime his brother committed.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh and Jason are on the trail of a karate expert accused of killing his employer.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Randall learns "hate comes high" in a town whose people have hired a trio of killers to murder their fellow resident Randy Holleran, a sniveling drunkard whom Josh can't stand but has promised his father to protect.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh captures a wanted recruit and returns him to the Army, but the Captain at an encampment refuses to pay the bounty as he has another use for the trooper.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh and Jason track down a fugitive in Texas wanted for murder in Arizona who they find is also sought by his wife who claims he is innocent.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: A dying man offers Josh $2000 to find his son, who ran away from home 15 years ago.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh and Jason are escorting four prisoners - three men and one woman - to Leavenworth prison when a stranger begins following along behind asking to travel with the group for protection.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh is summoned for help when the Pinto bank is robbed.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh expects a $400 bounty for bringing in Daniel Trenner but finds his prisoner stolen from him by the sheriff.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh is hired by a woman to sober up Harry a drunk who is also Josh's friend.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh and the beautiful female prisoner he is transporting to trial are on a three-day trip while her partner is still on the loose in the area.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh is on his way to River City to transport three convicts there to be hanged.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: A journalist from Boston accompanies Josh on his manhunt to get an exclusive story on a bounty hunter as part of a series of articles.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh feels compelled to repay a debt to an old friend who's in jail and may hang.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh brings in outlaw Carlos Domingo but he has to be released when the witness against him is killed in front of Josh.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh is sent for by Sheriff Mike Strata and the desperate men of Coronado.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh brings in a young man wanted for robbery but loses his reward and expenses.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh arrives in a town for rest and to gamble just as the local bank has been robbed.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: A widow wants to hire/propose to Josh so she doesn't lose custody of her son.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: A woman asks Josh, an old friend, to help find her husband Frank - a bounty hunter out to settle a score.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: When Randall has a sheriff bed a prisoner, the man's gang kidnaps the sheriff and two others and threatens to kill one per day until the man is freed.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: In Mexico, Josh is hired to protect a sensible man and his pregnant wife from his father-in-law and the villagers who are angered when he refuses the town healing woman or \\"witch\\".

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: After Josh reluctantly takes the task of finding a man and his wife's pet ewe, he becomes the butt of many jokes in the community while cattlemen nearly hang him when he mentions sheep.

programme.title: Have Gun Will Travel
programme.desc: Carl Soddenberg committed a heinous, murderous act. Paladin is hired to get him to an asylum and keep the family's survivors at bay who are out for revenge.

programme.title: Have Gun Will Travel
programme.desc: An art collector hires Paladin to guide him, and his strangely childlike daughter, to the camp of a reclusive sculptor.

programme.title: Have Gun Will Travel
programme.desc: Colonel Draco invites Paladin to investigate an "insurrection" over water rights. Paladin discovers that Draco was crippled eight months previously and wants revenge.

programme.title: Have Gun Will Travel
programme.desc: Paladin comes to pay his respects to the mother of a Chinese man who is killed. She asks Paladin to meet a ship bound for China and see that her granddaughter is brought safely aboard.

programme.title: Have Gun Will Travel
programme.desc: Paladin is riding to meet a lovely French lady in Los Angelos. On the way he encounters an Indian maiden being attacked.

programme.title: Have Gun Will Travel
programme.desc: After being tortured, Paladin, becomes a surrogate bull for a famous, but now insane bullfighter, Nino Ybarra..

programme.title: Have Gun Will Travel
programme.desc: Paladin is hired by a man to deliver ten thousand dollars. Paladin has to sift through a numbr of suspects, including a band of gypsies and the men who found the body.

programme.title: Have Gun Will Travel
programme.desc: New Mexico rancher Jesse Reade hires Paladin for $1,000 to bring back outlaw Dave Enderly, who has run off to Perdido, Mexico with Reade's daughter Nancy.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: Johnny Ringo, enraged by poker losses, holds up the other players. When he cools off, Ringo returns the money. However, a politically ambitious judge uses the incident to persecute Ringo, discredit Sheriff Hollister and win personal popularity.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: A cattle broker who deals with rustlers sets out to crush The Epitaph and Sheriff Clay Hollister, whose combined efforts are hurting his operations. He hires a has-been newspaperman to start a rival newspaper and the strategy seems to be succeeding!

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: Sheriff Hollister faces off against Apache chief Geronimo after an army supply train is attacked. In a shootout, Clay kills one brave and captures another. In retaliation, Geronimo warns more will die unless Hollister releases the Indian prisoner.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: Fugitive Logan Beatty hides out at the ranch of Alan Danbury. Danbury's daughter Kay, falling in love with the outlaw, helps disarm Sheriff Hollister when he comes to arrest Beatty. Hollister, Beatty, and Kay's father battle for the girl.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: Mitt Porter is involved in a robbery in which his partner Billy Clyde kills a man. Hollister tricks Matt into leading him to Billy's hideout, but Billy is killed before he can clear Mitt. Hollister and the editor then learn about the tragedy of his life.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: In love with Sally Wilson, Bill Hartley strikes a vein of silver while working on Tombstone's Main Street and sees a chance to win her heart. But when Bill is buried in a cave in, Sally must decide if she saves Bill or guard the secret of the mine.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: An outlaw gang ambushes a Mexican pack train near Tombstone. Don Jacinto Orosco, the sole survivor of the attack, refuses to wait for American law to deal justice to the gang. Instead, he sends for heavily-armed Mexicans to wipe out the killers.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: Frank Callaway wins acquittal for a client and then escapes death at the hands of the two men who tried to frame his client. Sheriff Hollister captures the killer but no lawyer will accept the defense; so Callaway himself volunteers.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: The World's Fastest Gun,' Billy Denver, comes to Tombstone to perform. Challenged by Johnny's Pearce, he faces his first human target - and kills him. When Johnny's brother hears the news, he heads for Tombstone to avenge his brother's death.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: Elias Ransome brings his band of religious emigrants to the outskirts of Tombstone, but a prejudiced rancher stirs up agitation against the newcomers, leading to an air of intolerance. Hollister and Clabourne must step in to resolve the situation.

programme.title: Maverick
programme.desc: Samantha arranges a poker game and sets Bret up as the fall guy when she invites robbers too. With his money, his reputation and possibly his life at stake, Bret hunts the thieves.

programme.title: Maverick
programme.desc: While posing as the nephew and heir of millionaire General Eakins, Bret desperately tries to solve the man's murder before his ruse is exposed.

programme.title: Maverick
programme.desc: Bret and Bart try to stop a robbery while the sheriff is distracted by a pretty woman.

programme.title: Have Gun Will Travel
programme.desc: Manfred Holt breaks out of jail, killing two deputies. Is he on his way to kill the banker who testified against him, or to see his family for the last time?

programme.title: Have Gun Will Travel
programme.desc: A sportsman sponsors a contest, betting that no one can elude his posse in the Mojave Desert. When Paladin shows up riding a camel, the man decides that the only way he can still win is to get rid of Paladin.

programme.title: Have Gun Will Travel
programme.desc: At a stagecoach stop, Paladin sees a peaceful Cherokee rancher being beaten by men who think his cattle are spreading a sickness.

programme.title: Nick Cannon Presents: Wild 'N Out

programme.title: Nick Cannon Presents: Wild 'N Out

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi and friends arrive at KaibaCorp Island where the Battle City finalists will compete in the ultimate dueling arena! Get ready for the awesome four-person battle royal where any duelist can attack anyone else!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Honor, friendship, revenge... As each duelist remembers what they're fighting for, the battle royal rages on where none of the duelists know where the next attack is going to come from!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Joey may have fought some of the fiercest fights in Battle City, but has all his training taught him to become an elite duelist? Joey's gonna show what he's made of in the conclusion to the four-man battle royal!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Marik ensnares Joey in a Shadow Game where each duelist's heart is linked with his monsters... literally! Every time a monster received damage, the duelist feels the pain instead!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Marik's Helpoemer send Joey's powerful cards to the graveyard before Joey can use them! Running low on cards and life points, Joey's opportunities for staging a comeback are nearly depleted!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Joey thinks this duel can't turn any worse... but Marik has all the pieces necessary to summon The Winged Dragon of Ra! Can Joey prevent Marik from summoning the Egyptian God Card, or is victory simply not in the cards?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Marik transforms The Winged Dragon of Ra into its powerful form, the Egyptian God Phoenix! If Joey can't withstand the Phoenix's blazing fire, he'll lose the duel... plus his only chance to save Mai from her mental prison!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: It's the rematch we've all been waiting for! Yugi and Kaiba square off for the first time since Duelist Kingdom in front of thousands of ravenous fans for the right to challenge Marik! It's time to duel!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Kaiba has all the monsters necessary to summon Obelisk the Tormentor to finish Yugi off! Though overwhelmed and outmatched, nothing is going to stop Yugi from trying to summon his Egyptian God first!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: When Yugi's Slifer the Sky Dragon clashes against Kaiba's Obelisk the Tormentor, what will happen when two Egyptian Gods fight each other? It's time to find out which Egyptian God is truly stronger!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The clash of the two Egyptian God Monsters releases mystical energies that show Yugi and Kaiba visions of the ancient Egyptian past! What new answers do these images unlock, and what prophecies do they make for the future?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Kaiba summons three powerful Blue-Eyes White Dragons, but Yugi has no monsters remaining in his deck! Is losing only a matter of time, or will a long-dormant card from a fallen friend help turn the tide of battle?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Kaiba not only controls Blue-Eyes Ultimate Dragon, but his Final Attack Orders card leaves Yugi with only three cards in his deck! If Yugi loses, he'll have to give up his chance to save the world from Marik's evil!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Tired of Kaiba's insults, Joey challenges Kaiba for third place in the Battle City Tournament! Has Joey mastered enough strategies to take down the top dog, or is Kaiba going to wallop Joey like a pathetic puppy?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Kaiba attacks with his mighty Blue-Eyes White Dragon, but Joey has no monsters to defend with! Joey's luck has run out, so it's time for him to rely on skill!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Joey and Kaiba's battle reaches its roaring climax! Will Joey take down his biggest headache and actually teach Kaiba a thing or two about being a true duelist?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: It's the critical Battle City showdown with the fate of the world at stake: Yami Yugi vs. Marik! If Yami Yugi loses, Yugi is taking a permanent vacation into the Shadow Realm!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Marik proves his The Winged Dragon of Ra is the strongest Egyptian God Card by destroying Slifer the Sky Dragon! None of Yugi's cards can withstand its assault, but a gift from Kaiba may turn the duel around…

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi can't strike Marik's life points, and with every turn that passes, Marik is one step closer to taking down Yugi with a final strike from The Winged Dragon of Ra...

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: With Yugi at the end of his ropes and the maniacal Marik waging all-out war, can Marik's oldest friend reach Marik in time to help him come to his senses before his insanity overwhelms him?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Will the combined force of all of Yugi's monsters be enough to defeat an Egyptian God that terminated two other powerful Egyptian Gods? The fate of the world hangs in the balance with the finale of the Battle City Tournament!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: KaibaCorp Island is set to explode in mere minutes, but the blimp's engines are offline! Can Yugi and friends escape from the island in time, or will they sink to the bottom of the sea?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: As Téa and Serenity tour around the Town of Domino and reminisce about their friends' battles during Battle City, they learn how much they've grown and far they've come... and how far they have left to go!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The three Egyptian God Cards are stolen! A terrifying new villain emerges! Real monsters begin to appear around the world! Can Yugi and the gang discover how these strange events are connected before the planet is destroyed?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: With Seal of Orichalcos, not only can Gurimo have ten monsters at once, but each creature receives a power boost from Orichalcos's malevolent energies! Yugi better find a way to protect himself against Gurimo's horde!
